calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Daniels for Santiago Robleto.

The Court noted that Ms. Artiga was not present. Mr. Daniels stated that a copy of the petition was faxed to Mr. Damar on January 30, 2012 and that Mr. Damar supports the petition. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration appointing Santiago Robleto as Successor Administrator with limited authority and with no bond required (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Damer for and with Santiago Robleto (Petitioner). Peter Clerides for and with Julia Vargas (Objector).

Mr. Clerides stated that the property was transferred 5 years ago by the trust, that the will was not filed within the 30 day requirement, and that there was no basis for letters to be issued. In addition, Mr Clerides stated that the petitioner should file a 850 petition, and that the will did not mention the subject property. Mr. Damer stated that he filed for probate within 30 days of the subscribing witness, and that if the deed was forged, then the property was still in the estate. In addition, he stated that Ms. Vargas was not listed in the will and that she had no standing. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Joanne Prior CSR 129. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Continued To Feb-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
